content.full_text:
January 23, 1991

FPPC
428 J St. # 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA. 95804

Sirs:

Could you please clear up a question for me.

Can funds raised for one type of local office be used for another type of office in the future.

Example: The campaign committee "Friends of Mr. X" raises money for X's School Board race in 1991. X wins the seat yet has money left over from the campaign. Can that money be used for Mr. X's Mayor race in 1993 using the same campaign committee "Friends of Mr. X"?

Thank you for your help.

[signature]

Philip E. Paule
POB 9425
San Bernardino, CA.
92427
(714) 880-3827
